description: Run the automated stack on Windows 10 x64.
Run the automated stack on an AMD x64 CPU.
Verify hotkey snip at 100% display scaling.
Verify hotkey snip at 125% display scaling.
Verify hotkey snip at 150% display scaling.
Verify hotkey snip with at least two monitors using different scaling.
Verify hotkey snip with a monitor positioned left of or above the primary display.
Verify app launch, settings, toast, and hotkey snip in Windows light theme.
Verify app launch, settings, toast, and hotkey snip in Windows dark theme.
Run release verification from a non-elevated standard account.
Run release verification from an elevated admin account.
Enable launch at login, reboot, sign in, and verify Ctrl+Shift+O starts a snip.
Select text on each monitor and across monitor boundaries where the layout permits; verify copied text matches the target.
Run OCR self-tests or fixture OCR on an Intel x64 CPU.
Run OCR self-tests or fixture OCR on an AMD x64 CPU.
